title: Brian Hinton // Design & Accessibility
description: Accessibility lead, design systems thinker, and people manager. Currently at Superhuman, formerly Grammarly.

focus.label: Focusing
focus.detail: on building out Superhuman's accessibility program, defining audit processes, mentoring engineers on ARIA patterns, and shipping keyboard navigation improvements across the app.
focus.simple: making Superhuman easier to use for people who navigate with keyboards and screen readers.

music.label: Listening
music.simple: a fun song called CPR by a band named Wet Leg.

reading.label: Reading
reading.simple: a book about oysters and how they changed the world, by Mark Kurlansky.

watching.label: Watching
watching.simple: a new movie called Hail Mary.
